member.name: T:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute
member.summary: Attribute that controls when log messages should be output to the test runner's output window in xUnit v3 tests.

remarks.para: This attribute combines the functionality of with xUnit v3's to enable automatic log output based on test outcome. Unlike xUnit v2, xUnit v3 provides access to test results, making it possible to conditionally output logs based on test outcome.
Use this attribute instead of when working with xUnit v3. The standard will not work with xUnit because xUnit v2 doesn't provide test outcome information.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the default timing of .

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.#ctor(DepenMock.Attributes.LogOutputTiming)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified timing.
member.param: The timing that determines when log messages should be output.

member.name: P:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.Timing
member.summary: Gets the timing that determines when log messages should be output.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.Before(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,Xunit.v3.IXunitTest)
member.summary: Executes before the test to capture initial state.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.After(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,Xunit.v3.IXunitTest)
member.summary: Executes after the test to output logs if conditions are met.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.ShouldOutputForTiming(DepenMock.Attributes.LogOutputTiming,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Determines if logs should be output based on timing configuration and test result.
member.returns: True if logs should be output, false otherwise.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.Attributes.LogOutputAttribute.GetLoggerFromTestInstance(System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to extract the logger from the test instance using reflection.
member.returns: The test logger if found, null otherwise.

member.name: T:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTest
member.summary: Serves as a base class for test implementations, providing shared functionality and a dependency injection container.
member.remarks: The class is designed to be inherited by test classes that require a common setup or shared resources. It initializes a instance, which can be used for dependency injection or other purposes. Derived classes can access the property to manage dependencies within the test context.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTest.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor sets up the property with a new instance of the class. Derived classes can use this container for dependency injection or other purposes.

member.name: P:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTest.Container
member.summary: Gets the container instance associated with the current context.

member.name: T:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2
member.summary: Provides a base class for test implementations that rely on abstraction, enabling the resolution of a system under test (SUT) and logging functionality.
member.remarks: This class is designed to facilitate testing scenarios where the system under test is resolved from a dependency injection container and logging is required. Ensure that the dependency injection container is properly configured with the necessary registrations for before using this class.
member.typeparam: The concrete type of the system under test, which must implement .
The interface type that the system under test implements.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor registers a logger implementation for the specified interface type in the dependency injection container. The logger is registered as a instance associated with the provided .

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2.AddContainerCustomizations(DepenMock.Container)
member.summary: Allows derived classes to add custom ISpecimenBuilder instances to the container's fixture.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2.ResolveSut
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the system under test (SUT) from the dependency injection container.
member.remarks: Ensure that the dependency injection container is properly configured and contains a registration for before calling this method.
member.returns: An instance of resolved from the container, or if the container is not available.

member.name: P:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2.Logger
member.summary: Gets a logger instance for the specified interface type.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2.Dispose
member.summary: Outputs log messages if configured and disposes resources.
member.remarks: This method is called when the test is complete to output log messages when the is present on the test method or class. Since XUnit doesn't provide direct access to test results, it assumes the test passed if no exception was thrown.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByAbstraction`2.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the instance and optionally outputs log messages.

member.name: T:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1
member.summary: Provides a base class for tests that are specific to a given type.
member.remarks: This abstract class serves as a foundation for creating tests that are tied to a specific type. It includes functionality for resolving instances of the type from a container and managing logging specific to the type.
member.typeparam: The type associated with the test. This type must be a reference type.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class and registers a logger for the specified test type.
member.remarks: This constructor ensures that a logger of type is registered in the container for the test type. Derived classes can rely on this registration for logging purposes.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1.AddContainerCustomizations(DepenMock.Container)
member.summary: Allows derived classes to add custom ISpecimenBuilder instances to the container's fixture.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1.ResolveSut
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified type from the container.
member.remarks: This method retrieves an instance of from the container, if available. Ensure that the container is properly initialized and contains a registration for .
member.returns: An instance of if the container is not null and the type is registered; otherwise, .

member.name: P:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1.Logger
member.summary: Gets a logger instance for recording and managing log entries specific to the type .

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1.Dispose
member.summary: Outputs log messages if configured and disposes resources.
member.remarks: This method is called when the test is complete to output log messages when the is present on the test method or class. Since XUnit doesn't provide direct access to test results, it assumes the test passed if no exception was thrown.

member.name: M:DepenMock.XUnit.V3.BaseTestByType`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the instance and optionally outputs log messages.
